rationale: For a professional tool-grade application like ProfJohns (referencing Figma and Perplexity), the UI must be dense, clear, and highly functional. We avoid all gradients, relying on solid colors, crisp 1px borders, and a stark, confident typographic hierarchy.

headings.usage: Use for all page titles, canvas node titles, and surface headers. Do not use Inter for headings.

body.usage: Use for dense data, node content, and writing surface body text.

mono.usage: Use for AI credit costs, citations, model names, and code blocks.

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Optical alignment, dense but breathable. Utilize generous padding in reading surfaces, but tight, structural grids in the canvas nodes.
spacing_and_layout.canvas_chrome: Floating toolbars must be solid white with a 1px border. No glassmorphism. Use 'p-1' or 'p-2' with 'gap-1' for dense icon rows.
spacing_and_layout.node_cards: Use 'p-4' internally, 'rounded-lg', 'border border-neutral-200', 'bg-white'. Avoid heavy drop shadows; use 'shadow-sm' for floating feeling.

surfaces.writing: Max-width centered column ('max-w-3xl'), 'pt-24', 'px-8'. Left rail for connected sources, Right rail for AI-assist.
surfaces.review: Split pane layout. 50% gallery/grid of sources, 50% reading agent side panel. Borders separating the panes ('border-l border-neutral-200').
surfaces.workspace: Left sidebar navigation ('w-64', 'border-r'), main content area.

buttons.primary: bg-neutral-900 text-white rounded-md px-4 py-2 text-sm font-medium hover:bg-neutral-800 transition-colors
buttons.secondary: bg-white text-neutral-900 border border-neutral-200 rounded-md px-4 py-2 text-sm font-medium hover:bg-neutral-50 transition-colors
buttons.icon: p-1.5 rounded-md text-neutral-600 hover:bg-neutral-100 hover:text-neutral-900 transition-colors

nodes.header: flex justify-between items-center pb-2 border-b border-neutral-100 mb-2
nodes.title: text-sm font-semibold font-general-sans text-neutral-900
nodes.model_picker: text-xs font-mono text-neutral-500 bg-neutral-50 px-2 py-0.5 rounded border border-neutral-200 cursor-pointer hover:bg-neutral-100

editor.styling: prose prose-neutral max-w-none prose-headings:font-general-sans prose-headings:tracking-tight prose-a:text-blue-600 prose-a:no-underline hover:prose-a:underline

components.data_testid: MANDATORY on all buttons, links, inputs, and interactive canvas nodes (e.g., 'data-testid="node-model-picker"').

motion.interaction: Micro-interactions on hover. Use framer-motion for smooth sidebar toggles or panel slides. Keep durations short (150-200ms).
motion.canvas: React Flow handles pan/zoom. Node spawning should scale in slightly (0.95 -> 1.0) with opacity fade.

icons.style: Stroke width 1.5 for a crisp, technical look. Size 16px or 18px for toolbars.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install 'General Sans' via fontshare or local assets. Use 'Inter' for body.
Implement the UI using Tailwind v4 standard utility classes. ENSURE ZERO GRADIENTS (`bg-gradient`, `bg-transparent` with blur are forbidden). Everything must be solid colors.
Build the React Flow canvas with custom node components matching the exact styling in 'components.nodes'.
For Writing/Review surfaces, use a full-width layout with structural 1px borders (`border-neutral-200`) separating rails/panels.
All interactive elements must include `data-testid` attributes (e.g., `data-testid="workspace-nav-library"`).
Implement the floating toolbar on the canvas with `absolute bottom-6 left-1/2 -translate-x-1/2 bg-white border border-neutral-200 shadow-sm rounded-lg p-1.5 flex gap-1 z-50`.
For the always-on reading agent, use a sticky side panel on the right with a message feed layout, distinguished by a subtle background color (`bg-neutral-50`).
